data.name: Real Dive World
data.detailed_description:
A story set in the not-too-distant future...

In a world where the virtual space "Real Dive System" has become the foundation of people's entertainment, the protagonist, Hikaru Arata, gets caught up in a sinister plot that misuses the Real Dive System.

This game features turn-based battles and exploration as its main gameplay elements.

  • Turn-based battles

  • Animation CG

  • Gacha system included

  • Large volume of maps

  • A unique and distinctive worldview
data.about_the_game:
A story set in the not-too-distant future...

In a world where the virtual space "Real Dive System" has become the foundation of people's entertainment, the protagonist, Hikaru Arata, gets caught up in a sinister plot that misuses the Real Dive System.

This game features turn-based battles and exploration as its main gameplay elements.

  • Turn-based battles

  • Animation CG

  • Gacha system included

  • Large volume of maps

  • A unique and distinctive worldview
data.short_description: In a world where the virtual space "Real Dive System" has become the foundation of people's entertainment, the protagonist, Hikaru Arata, gets caught up in a sinister plot that misuses the Real Dive System.
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

  • Graphics: DirectX 10/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
